TEXT.source: Seediq Wikipedia, article: R Čhl Čc ČHaising
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = R Čhl Čc Č/Haising = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang R Čhl Čc Č/Haising. 169 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 574 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 91% niqan 521 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 9% niqan 53 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun65%, Rukai1%, Cou5%, Paiwan 6%, Hla'alua 11%, Amis 2%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = …ĺ*ńßl* ¶*/ńßaisiŇč = gaga mniq kawsjuŇčsu tawjun ¶ju ka alaŇč …ĺ*ńßl* ¶*/ńßaisiŇč. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, bunun**%, …ĺukai*%, ¶ou*%, paiwan *%, ńßla'alua **%, amis *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%.
S.FORM: = R Čhl Čc Č/Haising = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang R Čhl Čc Č/Haising. 169 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 574 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 91% niqan 521 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 9% niqan 53 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun65%, Rukai1%, Cou5%, Paiwan 6%, Hla'alua 11%, Amis 2%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
